description: Fixed live labeller layers: read-only automatic labels, shared manual labels, and the current user's personal manual layer.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'system:model:platinum_substage_labels' AS id, 'Automatic Substage Labels' AS name, 'System generated · Read-only' AS description, 'platinum_substage_labels' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, :well_name AS well_name, 'system-model' AS owner_email, 'system-model' AS created_by_email, 'system-model' AS updated_by_email, 'model' AS source_type, false AS is_editable, false AS can_edit, -100 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status UNION ALL SELECT 'manual:shared' AS id, 'Manual' AS name, 'Shared manual layer · Editable by everyone' AS description, 'manual_shared' AS rule_concept_id, :labeler_id AS labeler_id, :well_name AS well_name, 'shared' AS owner_email, 'shared' AS created_by_email, 'shared' AS updated_by_email, 'user' AS source_type, true AS is_editable, true AS can_edit, 0 AS display_order, true AS is_visible_default, 'active' AS status ) q
